text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Plan Characteristics (2007-2014) │ October 2021 │ V 1.4 147 

GAP_MO_COPAY_1M 

LABEL: Gap Mail Order Pharmacy Copay for 1-month supply 

DESCRIPTION: This variable identifies the beneficiary co-payment amount for a 1-month supply of the drugs on this 
tier, using a standard mail order pharmacy during the coverage gap phase of the Part D benefit. 

SHORT NAME: — 

LONG NAME: GAP_MO_COPAY_1M 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: CMS (HPMS
